nonBlocking.description: NewDropDestroyExplode added but not yet called from production atlas-channel (consumer/drop/consumer.go:132 still uses legacy NewDropDestroy explode path with delay=0). Documented at libs/atlas-packet/drop/clientbound/destroy.go:50-57. Not a violation.
NewMonsterDestroyBySwallow added but not yet called from production (no DestroyTypeSwallow emission path in kafka/consumer/monster yet). Helper is documented and tested. Not a violation.
ControlMonsterType is duplicated between lib and service (pre-existing pattern, not added on this branch). Service-side enum converts to lib type at the call boundary. Not a regression.
